query:
INSERT INTO products (establishmentId, categoryId, name, description, price, status, hasStock, sortOrder) 
SELECT 2, c.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, 'active', true, p.sortOrder
FROM categories c
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT 'Veggie Burger' as name, 'Pão integral, hambúrguer de grão de bico, queijo, alface, tomate e maionese vegana' as description, 28.90 as price, 1 as sortOrder
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Portobello Burger', 'Pão brioche, cogumelo portobello grelhado, queijo brie, rúcula e pesto', 32.90, 2
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Beyond Burger', 'Pão australiano, hambúrguer plant-based, queijo vegano, cebola caramelizada e molho especial', 38.90, 3
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Falafel Wrap', 'Wrap de falafel com homus, tabule, alface e molho tahine', 26.90, 4
) p
WHERE c.name = 'Vegetarianos' AND c.establishmentId = 2;
